ksa_text: Ability to develop and optimize information infrastructure architecture, including data models, APIs, systems design, and data management systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-A-002 (OP, Ability) maps to Quantitative Analyst scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4422 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.442, dcwf=0.412, nice=0.408. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within quantitative analysis, statistical modeling, and financial analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4422 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-A-002 (OP, composite 0.4422) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4422 with signal across ddat=0.442, dcwf=0.412, nice=0.408 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from OP-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Quantitative Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4422, domain OP, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
